description: Rise of Avalon Patch 1 Hotfix #1 (20 August 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where the invader's Infamy could be reset in certain circumstances when invading someone else's Corrupted Dungeon

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Fixed an issue where the invader's Infamy could be reset in certain circumstances when invading someone else's Corrupted Dungeon
